title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Marico Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Marico Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Marico Advisory Limited:
Marico Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico Advisory Limited!
